/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/convertdav.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/convertdav.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/convertdav.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/convertdav.dir/src/converters/registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/convertdav.dir/src/converters/png_jpg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/convertdav.dir/src/converters/invert.cpp.o CMakeFiles/convertdav.dir/src/converters/img_gif.cpp.o CMakeFiles/convertdav.dir/src/converters/pdf_png.cpp.o -o convertdav  /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so -lpthread /usr/lib/libMagick++-7.Q16HDRI.so /usr/lib/libMagickWand-7.Q16HDRI.so /usr/lib/libMagickCore-7.Q16HDRI.so
